name: hand_setup_id
description: Unique identifier for this hand setup, formatted as {clip_id}_{ordinal:03d} (e.g., 'abc123XYZ_001_001'). Primary key.

name: clip_id
description: Parent clip identifier. Foreign key to clip_manifest.clip_id.

name: video_id
description: Denormalized parent video identifier. Equals clip_manifest.video_id for this clip; stored to avoid joins on common queries.

name: hand_setup_time_seconds
description: Offset from start of source video (not from start of clip), in whole seconds.

name: frame_gcs_path
description: Full gs://... URI to the high-resolution setup frame extracted at hand_setup_time_seconds.

name: hand_setup_state
description: Observed state at the hand setup moment. Structure: {hand_setup_time_seconds: int, total_seat_count: int, pot_size_bb: number|null, players: [{seat_position_label: string, stack_size: number|null}]}. Outer hand_setup wrapper from raw LLM response is stripped before storage.

name: detected_at
description: Timestamp when this hand setup row was written. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
